global.description: The ad features a combination of geometric shapes and text elements promoting a sale.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of overlapping circles and squares in a light blue background.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square shape with a transparent fill and a blue outline, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large circle with a blue outline, positioned centrally and overlapping with other shapes.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle with a blue outline, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold, white text on a blue background that reads 'Watch what's trending Start free today'.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending Start free today

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A prominent black text at the top that says 'PulsePlay SALE'.

elements.label: Order button
elements.description: A small, bold, white text that reads 'Order now', positioned at the bottom.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small black text that says 'UGC', positioned at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, geometric shapes and sale promotion
embedding_texts.layout_text: Headline at the top, geometric shapes in the center, and CTAs at the bottom.
